untranslatable_reason: Diamond pattern detection requires pattern recognition logic (identifying points A, B, C and the diamond boundary structure) which cannot be expressed as a combination of allowed technical indicators and operators. The signal relies on visual/geometric pattern identification rather than quantitative thresholds. Donchian channels used as proxy for boundary detection, but true diamond pattern identification is not translatable to this rule engine.
translation_notes: Signal is context-dependent (reversal or breakout). Used Donchian channels (dc_upper/dc_lower) as approximation for diamond pattern boundaries. Target price of 47.62 is example-specific and cannot be dynamically calculated without pattern detection logic. Success rates documented: 69-79% (bullish), 69% (bearish), 17% average decline on reversals. Pattern is classified as REVERSAL type. Author did not specify volume requirements or pullback thresholds.
